audience.zh: 适合完全没有编程和机器学习基础，但想通过代码真正理解 ML 的学习者
audience.en: Best for learners with no coding or ML background who want to understand ML through code.

summary.zh: 从 Python、Notebook、最小训练流程到读懂示例代码，帮助初学者把抽象的机器学习概念落到真实代码上。
summary.en: Start with Python, notebooks, tiny training loops, and code reading so beginners can attach ML concepts to real code.

zh: 理解初学者最常见的 ML 代码结构长什么样
能在 Colab 或本地 Notebook 里跑通一个最小实验
知道如何从“看懂代码”逐步走到“改动代码”
en: Understand what a beginner-friendly ML codebase usually looks like
Run a minimal experiment in Colab or a local notebook
Move step by step from reading code to changing code with intent
